mapper.sql: (SELECT s.* FROM fund_score s INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(score_date) AS max_date FROM fund_score GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = s.fund_id AND m.max_date = s.score_date)
mapper.select: SELECT r.compare_id, r.user_id, r.compare_dimension, r.result_summary, COUNT(i.item_id) AS fund_count, r.created_time FROM fund_compare_record r LEFT JOIN fund_compare_item i ON i.compare_id = r.compare_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY r.compare_id, r.user_id, r.compare_dimension, r.result_summary, r.created_time ORDER BY r.created_time DESC, r.compare_id DESC

SELECT r.compare_id, r.user_id, r.compare_dimension, r.result_summary, COUNT(i.item_id) AS fund_count, r.created_time FROM fund_compare_record r LEFT JOIN fund_compare_item i ON i.compare_id = r.compare_id WHERE r.compare_id = #{compareId} GROUP BY r.compare_id, r.user_id, r.compare_dimension, r.result_summary, r.created_time

SELECT f.fund_id, f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.fund_type, f.risk_level, c.company_name, s.total_score, s.recommend_level, MAX(CASE WHEN pm.period_code = '1M' THEN pm.return_rate END) AS return_1m, MAX(CASE WHEN pm.period_code = '3M' THEN pm.return_rate END) AS return_3m, MAX(CASE WHEN pm.period_code = '6M' THEN pm.return_rate END) AS return_6m, MAX(CASE WHEN pm.period_code = '1Y' THEN pm.return_rate END) AS return_1y, MAX(CASE WHEN pm.period_code = 'YTD' THEN pm.return_rate END) AS return_ytd, MAX(CASE WHEN pm.period_code = 'SINCE' THEN pm.return_rate END) AS return_since, i.display_order FROM fund_compare_item i INNER JOIN fund_info f ON f.fund_id = i.fund_id LEFT JOIN fund_company c ON c.company_id = f.company_id LEFT JOIN s ON s.fund_id = f.fund_id LEFT JOIN fund_performance_metric pm ON pm.fund_id = f.fund_id AND pm.stat_date = ( SELECT MAX(pm2.stat_date) FROM fund_performance_metric pm2 WHERE pm2.fund_id = f.fund_id ) WHERE i.compare_id = #{compareId} GROUP BY f.fund_id, f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.fund_type, f.risk_level, c.company_name, s.total_score, s.recommend_level, i.display_order ORDER BY i.display_order ASC, f.fund_id ASC
